title: Combine two cells in one

posts.author: itayg (itay golan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,
I have a question about combining the data of two cells into one.
For example - see the screenshot, the idea is to merge the data located in the cells called “request date”. logically, the cell to be deleted will be the one without data in it.

Is the option possible?
